eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: San Miguel, NM; at 09:02 PM ON APR 22, 2026 Effective until 10:02 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
San Miguel Fire Department: Visibility in area will be reduced and roads/evacuation routes can become blocked; you could be trapped, injured, or killed. 

If you are on NM 266 between mile marker 4 and highway 94 or if you are on highway 94 between Sapello and county road A4A, you are on SET status.

If you are on county road A4A, you are on READY status. 

BE READY to evacuate when advised by local officials. 

MAKE a plan for your pets or other animals.

PREPARE now by getting essential supplies for you & those in your care, including pets and babies: food, water, cash, medication, gas, glasses/contacts, hearing aids, pet supplies, pet carriers, baby supplies, etc. and keep them with you. 

PREPARE by getting your essential documents, including: birth certificate, passports, driver's license, social security card, insurance cards, etc. and keeping them with you.

CHECK nmfireinfo.com for updates.
